description: 16-colour tile palette (issue #29). The array index IS the NE-corner hex digit an author writes: index 0-9 = '0'-'9', index 10-15 = 'a'-'f'. Order follows Minecraft's 16 dyes (white -> black). Sprites are authored greyscale and MULTIPLIED by the slot colour at render, so retuning any hex here recolours every tile using that slot WITHOUT re-authoring a single map — authors reference the slot, never the value.
